intro: One value, five costumes: fraction, decimal, percent, “out of”, chance. Drag the dial and watch them all change together — because they're all the SAME thing.

challenges.say: 3/4 = 0.75 = 75% = 15 out of 20. One value, four outfits — all on screen at once.

challenges.prompt: “1 out of 2” is the same as…

challenges.say: 9/20 = 45% = 0.45. “Out of” is just a fraction saying its name out loud.

options: on 1 out of 4 days like this, it rains
challenges.answer: on 1 out of 4 days like this, it rains
challenges.say: Probability is a fraction that talks about the future. 25% = 1/4 of the time.

challenges.prompt: Dial to 2/3 — careful, it's not a tidy percent!
challenges.say: 2/3 = 0.666… ≈ 67%. Some fractions never land on a neat decimal. They're still perfectly good numbers.

challenges.prompt: “3/4 of 20” unpacked into plain math is…
challenges.say: A fraction is an OPERATION in costume: the bar means ÷, and “of” means ×. So 20 × 3 ÷ 4 = 15.
